languages.text: "Это многое объясняет. В частности, то, что в официальной истории не сохранилось ни единого упоминания о нем". {n}На лбу Янриса проступает напряженная складка.{/n} "Полагаю, за всем этим кроется нечто куда более скверное и темное, чем мы можем хотя бы предположить".

traits.locale_text: "Это многое объясняет. В частности, то, что в официальной истории не сохранилось ни единого упоминания о нем". {n}На лбу Янриса проступает напряженная складка.{/n} "Полагаю, за всем этим кроется нечто куда более скверное и темное, чем мы можем хотя бы предположить".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum_MB

languages.text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."
languages.original_text: "Это многое объясняет. В частности, то, что в официальной истории не сохранилось ни единого упоминания о нем". {n}На лбу Янриса проступает напряженная складка.{/n} "Полагаю, за всем этим кроется нечто куда более скверное и темное, чем мы можем хотя бы предположить".

traits.locale_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

"That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

"That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

languages.text: “这解释了很多事，尤其是为什么官方历史中没有任何关于他的记录。”{n}詹里斯的眉头拧出一道沟壑。{/n}“我猜这背后定有见不得人的邪恶秘密，而且恐怕远超我们的想象。”
languages.original_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

traits.locale_text: “这解释了很多事，尤其是为什么官方历史中没有任何关于他的记录。”{n}詹里斯的眉头拧出一道沟壑。{/n}“我猜这背后定有见不得人的邪恶秘密，而且恐怕远超我们的想象。”

languages.text: «Eso explica muchas cosas. Concretamente, el hecho de que no se le mencione en ningún documento histórico». {n}Una arruga tensa aparece en la frente de Janris.{/n} «Supongo que todo esto ha de tener una explicación, por turbia e ignominiosa que nos parezca».
languages.original_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

traits.locale_text: «Eso explica muchas cosas. Concretamente, el hecho de que no se le mencione en ningún documento histórico». {n}Una arruga tensa aparece en la frente de Janris.{/n} «Supongo que todo esto ha de tener una explicación, por turbia e ignominiosa que nos parezca».

languages.text: « Voilà qui explique bien des choses. Notamment le fait qu'il ne reste aucune trace de lui dans les chroniques officielles. » {n}Janris fronce les sourcils d'un air inquiet.{/n} « À mon avis, tout cela cache une sombre affaire qui va bien plus loin que nous ne l'imaginons. »
languages.original_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui explique bien des choses. Notamment le fait qu'il ne reste aucune trace de lui dans les chroniques officielles. » {n}Janris fronce les sourcils d'un air inquiet.{/n} « À mon avis, tout cela cache une sombre affaire qui va bien plus loin que nous ne l'imaginons. »

languages.text: "Das erklärt einiges. Vor allem, warum er in der offiziellen Geschichtsschreibung keine Erwähnung findet." {n}Auf Janris' Stirn bildet sich eine strenge Furche.{/n} "Ich vermute, hinter all dem steckt etwas Dunkles und Ruchloses ... weit mehr, als wir uns vorstellen können."
languages.original_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

traits.locale_text: "Das erklärt einiges. Vor allem, warum er in der offiziellen Geschichtsschreibung keine Erwähnung findet." {n}Auf Janris' Stirn bildet sich eine strenge Furche.{/n} "Ich vermute, hinter all dem steckt etwas Dunkles und Ruchloses ... weit mehr, als wir uns vorstellen können."

languages.text: "Bu pek çok şeyi açıklıyor. Özellikle de resmî tarihlerde ondan hiç bahsedilmemiş olmasını." {n}Janris'in alnında gergin bir çizgi oluşuyor.{/n} "Sanırım tüm bunların ardında karanlık ve iğrenç bir şeyler olmalı. Tahmin edebileceğimizden çok daha fazlası..."
languages.original_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

traits.locale_text: "Bu pek çok şeyi açıklıyor. Özellikle de resmî tarihlerde ondan hiç bahsedilmemiş olmasını." {n}Janris'in alnında gergin bir çizgi oluşuyor.{/n} "Sanırım tüm bunların ardında karanlık ve iğrenç bir şeyler olmalı. Tahmin edebileceğimizden çok daha fazlası..."

languages.text: 「なるほど、それが多くのことを説明してくれる。特に、彼の名前が公式の歴史書に一切残っていないという事実だ。」{n}ジャンリスの眉間に深い皺が刻まれた。{/n}「この背後には、我々が想像する以上に、暗く悪辣な何かがあるに違いない。」
languages.original_text: "That explains a great many things. In particular, the fact that no mention of him survives in the official histories." {n}A tense furrow forms on Janris's brow.{/n} "I suppose there must be something dark and nefarious behind all this, far more than we can even guess."

traits.locale_text: 「なるほど、それが多くのことを説明してくれる。特に、彼の名前が公式の歴史書に一切残っていないという事実だ。」{n}ジャンリスの眉間に深い皺が刻まれた。{/n}「この背後には、我々が想像する以上に、暗く悪辣な何かがあるに違いない。」
